title: Create: Always Backtank
description: makes it always shows air in backtanks
body: Ever wanted a simple Create addon that lets you always see air in backtanks? Well, here it is. This addon might just be right for you. It adds a basic number display to the right of the hotbar that disappears when the regular Create one is visible. It’s especially useful if you have a mod like the Create Thin Air compatibility mod, so you can always see exactly how much time you have left.
